interpretation: This gate tests whether OPQ/protected geometry mitigates the lookup-like uniqueness observed in the n500 canonical PQ packet while preserving the source-private control pass and byte-causality diagnostics.
pass_rule: A noncanonical geometry variant must pass source controls, keep source accuracy within 0.02 of canonical PQ at the same remap/budget, and either improve public-mean top-codeword lift removal by >=0.05 or reduce unique matched payloads by at least 25 at n500 while the reused-payload subset still beats target by >=0.10.
